zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Montgomery於1440年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾時，她的父親Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie59歲，母親Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie27歲。她於1460年3月25日與John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1467年8月24日在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾享年27歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Montgomery于1440年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾时，她的父亲Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie59岁，母亲Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie27岁。她于1460年3月25日与John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy在英国苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1467年8月24日在英国苏格兰艾斯爾享年27岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Montgomery was born in 1440, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, her father, Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie, was 59 and her mother, Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie, was 27. She married John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy on 25 March 1460, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 24 August 1467, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 27, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Montgomery est née en 1440, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy le 25 mars 1460, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 août 1467, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Culzean Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, Unit: Culzean Castle, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Montgomery 1440 in Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie 59 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie 27. Sie hat am 25. März 1460 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. August 1467 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Montgomery è nata il nel 1440 nel Renfrewshire, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie, aveva 59 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy il 25 marzo 1460, nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 agosto 1467, nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolta a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Montgomeryが1440年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで生まれた時，父Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerieは59歳，母Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerieは27歳であった。1460年3月25日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアでJohn Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1467年8月24日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアで27歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Montgomery(이)가 1440년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie(은)는 59세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1460년 3월 25일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1467년 8월 24일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Montgomery nasceu em 1440, em Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy em 25 de março de 1460, em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1467, em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 27 anos, e foi sepultada em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Montgomery родилась в 1440 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy 25 марта 1460 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 24 августа 1467 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.
